note: User-reported: missing local LoRA raised the bug-reporter dialog instead of a toast; queue then stuck with a dead STOP
Root-caused 3 independent defects (cold-start comfy:ready miss, remote-only 400 parser, orphaned Cue lane); implementing

Hypothesis 'executor never advances the store to a terminal on error' was REFUTED — commandExecutor.js:1765 does call settle(jobId, PHASES.ERROR). Real cause of the dead STOP is the activeGenerations registry delete vs the panel rendering from _lanes[lane].active. No setTimeout race involved.

Local 400 body shape pinned to ComfyUI source (server.py:1126 {error,node_errors}; execution.py:1063 extra_info.received_value; :1232 details is '' when another output validated) rather than inferred — the empty `details` in the user's log is what the old regex was scraping.

User-verified live on the local engine (cold start + reuse): toast not dialog; LoRA removal generates; folder re-add + reuse + Q generates with the LoRA. 10 new guards pass, eslint clean, generationStore contract (20) unaffected.
